title: /kernel:run
summary_text: Current-bootstrap evidence summary: - `kernel-bootstrap-receipt` is not written for this run: `run id: unknown-run`, `present: false` at `/Users/masayuki/.config/kernel/bootstrap-receipts/unknown-run.json`. - `state/active-model-lanes.jsonl` shows mixed historical records and no run-scoped filter. Latest segment includes: - `glm` success entries and frequent failures (`failureClass: network`). - `gemini-cli` only failures. - `copilot` mixed: several `ok:true`, multiple `ok:false` with reason `copilot CLI found but no GH token`. - `state/lane-runs.jsonl` confirms instability and not-yet-run-scoped integrity: - repeated `glm` network failures followed by intermittent success, - repeated `copilot` availability/unavailability oscillation (`unavailable` / `copilot_output_not_json` / success), - repeated `gemini-cli` command failures. - Compliance implication from these logs alone: cannot prove a truthful 6+ materially active lane state with stable current-run evidence. - Strongest gap: no run-bound receipt or manifest evidence means any kernel "active/healthy" claim would be weak or stale.
